title: Ordinance Requiring All Market Vendors in the Public Markets in the Municipality of Los Baños Selling Vegetable, Fruits, Meat, Chicken and Fish to Cover Their Goods with Thin Transparent Plastic As Precautionary Measure to Prevent the Spread of Corona Virus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) and Other Emerging Infectious Diseases (EIDS). (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 03/16/2020)
